testimonials.quote1: "My daughter absolutely loves Mamarie clothes. The quality is amazing!"
testimonials.quote2: "Armenia's best kids clothing brand. Fast delivery, perfect quality."

banner.title: Get 20% Off Your First Order
banner.subtitle:
Join the Mamarie family and dress your little ones
in premium style with our welcome discount.

card1.title: Born from a mother's love
card1.description: MaMarie was born from the love story of a mother and her little Mari. Every collection carries that warmth and care.

card2.title: For a colorful childhood
card2.description: We believe childhood should be bright, joyful, and full of beautiful memories. Our colors and designs are created to build exactly that world.

card3.title: Comfort without limits
card3.description: Children should move freely, play, dream, and discover the world. That is why our clothes are made first and foremost for their comfort.

card4.title: Confidence
card4.description: When a child grows up in love, care, and a beautiful environment, they walk more confidently toward their future. We believe every little one deserves that kind of childhood.

aboutUs.introText: From that idea, MaMarie was born — a brand that believes clothing is more than just clothing. It is the continuation of childhood colors, freedom, comfort, and a mother's love.
aboutUs.storyLead: A little girl was born — thanks to Mari.
aboutUs.storyBody: When I became a mother, I realized that every choice we make for our children becomes part of their childhood. Our colors, our hugs, and the memories we create shape their world.
aboutUs.closingText: We want every child to grow up feeling that the world is beautiful, safe, and full of love.

hero_subtitle: Discover amazing products and exclusive offers. Shop the latest trends and find everything you need in one place.
features_subtitle: An unsatisfied customer who has a reason is a problem, but an unsatisfied customer who cannot explain is a bigger problem.
feature_fast_delivery_description: There likely was no collaboration and checkpoints, there was no process.
feature_best_quality_description: This is a content strategy that went wrong from the very beginning.
feature_free_return_description: This is true, but that's not all that's needed to get things back on track.
